mapper.select: SELECT product_id, product_code, product_name, category, unit, reorder_point, reorder_qty, unit_cost, is_active FROM PRODUCT WHERE product_id = #{productId}
SELECT CONCAT( #{prefix}, '-', LPAD( IFNULL( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(product_code, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0 ) + 1, 3, '0' ) ) FROM PRODUCT WHERE product_code LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '-%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT (product_code, product_name, category, unit, reorder_point, reorder_qty, unit_cost, is_active) VALUES (#{productCode}, #{productName}, #{category}, #{unit}, #{reorderPoint}, #{reorderQty}, #{unitCost}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT SET product_name = #{productName}, category = #{category}, unit = #{unit}, reorder_point = #{reorderPoint}, reorder_qty = #{reorderQty}, unit_cost = #{unitCost}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE PRODUCT SET is_active = 0 WHERE product_id = #{productId}
